channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Nancy Mace: Capitol transgender bathroom rules protect women
item.description: Republican Rep. Nancy Mace said she's going to "fight like hell" for a resolution to keep Sarah McBride from using the women's bathroom.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Syrian national accused of funneling over $9 million in US-funded humanitarian aid to terrorist organization
item.description: The U.S. attorney's office said that a Syrian national was charged after allegedly funneling more than $9 million in U.S.-funded humanitarian aid to terrorist organizations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Grassley: Gaetz Ethics report's release would result in 'faster consideration' of nomination
item.description: Sen. Chuck Grassley (Iowa), the incoming Republican chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, said Tuesday that the House Ethics Committee would help speed up the Senate’s consideration of former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) to lead the Justice Department if it releases its report on Gaetz.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Donald Trump to nominate Dr. Oz for Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump plans to nominate former Pennsylvania Senate nominee Dr. Mehmet Oz to serve as the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) Administrator.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, Fox 5

item.title: Trump sets records with pace of appointments, but that doesn't mean the transition is going smoothly
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — In the two weeks since Election Day, President-elect Donald Trump has been setting records with the pace of appointments for his incoming administration. But speed shouldn’t be confused with organization.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump to nominate Mehmet Oz for CMS administrator
item.description: President-elect Trump said Tuesday he is nominating television personality Dr. Mehmet Oz to serve as the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) administrator. Oz unsuccessfully ran for Senate in Pennsylvania in 2022 with Trump's endorsement and has been a Trump ally ever since.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GOP senators divided on release of Gaetz ethics report as Trump pressures them to move quickly
item.description: As President-elect Donald Trump digs in on his pick of Matt Gaetz for attorney general, Republican senators are divided over how much information they will demand to move his confirmation — and how much to push back on Trump as he demands that they quickly rubber stamp his Cabinet once he takes offi
item.dc:creator: Mary Clare Jalonick And Stephen Groves, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump appoints Dr. Oz to key HHS position in new administration
item.description: President-elect Trump announced on Tuesday that Dr. Mehmet Oz will be his nominee for Administrator to the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate report claims Biden failures in protecting migrant children
item.description: GOP Sen. Bill Cassidy launched a formal investigation more than a year ago into unaccompanied migrant kids.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Vance will introduce Gaetz, Hegseth to senators this week
item.description: Vice President-elect JD Vance will make the rounds with GOP senators later this week to introduce them to former-Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) and Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump’s picks to head the Justice and Defense departments.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Someone accessed files said to contain damaging info about Trump AG-nominee Gaetz, lawyer says
item.description: An attorney says an unauthorized person gained access to a file containing confidential testimony from women who have made allegations about former Rep. Matt Gaetz, Donald Trump’s pick to become the next attorney general.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Manhattan DA opposes Trump’s bid to dismiss hush money conviction
item.description: Manhattan prosecutors on Tuesday said they will oppose President-elect Trump’s demand to dismiss his New York criminal conviction following the election, instead floating the idea the judge could freeze the case until Trump leaves office.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota House leaders agree to even split on committee control
item.description: Democratic and Republican legislative leaders will name members to the panels for the 2025 legislative session.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: FEMA chief agrees to investigation after congressional hearing
item.description: Questions have focused on the agency’s preparedness and response to recent disasters, including Hurricanes Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Defense pick Peter Hegseth paid accuser to protect his career, his lawyer confirms
item.description: The Fox News host reached a settlement to resolve an accusation against him, but a recently released memo brought the issue back into the public eye.
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell, MPR News

item.title: House Ethics Committee to meet Wednesday amid debate over Gaetz report
item.description: Members of the House Ethics Committee will meet Wednesday, a source confirmed to The Hill, as the panel weighs whether it should release its report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.), whom President-elect Trump plans to nominate to serve as attorney general.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Federal workers brace for Trump overhaul of civil service
item.description: President-elect Trump’s plans to reshape the federal workforce would allow him to fire wide swaths of career employees and replace them with political appointees — a move that comes as he has demanded loyalty at every level of government.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Accused of violating worker rights, SpaceX and Amazon go after labor board
item.description: SpaceX and Amazon are asking the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals to find the National Labor Relations Board unconstitutional. The federal agency is tasked with enforcing workers' right to organize.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu, MPR News

item.title: Trump picks Karoline Leavitt to be youngest White House press secretary in history
item.description: Leavitt will be the youngest person to ever hold the job and is expected to deliver press briefings based on Trump’s statement late Friday that he has “utmost confidence she will excel at the podium.
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore, MPR News

item.title: RFK Jr. wants to 'Make America Healthy Again.' He could face a lot of pushback
item.description: RFK Jr. wants to tackle chronic disease. Despite controversial views on vaccines, his focus on healthy food and taking on special interests may find broad support — and face political headwinds.
item.dc:creator: Will Stone and Allison Aubrey, MPR News

item.title: The last actions the Biden administration will take before Trump takes over the White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Biden administration officials are working against the clock doling out billions in grants and taking other steps to try to preserve at least some of the outgoing president’s legacy before President-elect Donald Trump takes office in January.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, MATTHEW DALY and COLLIN BINKLEY Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump draft executive order would set up board to oust generals en masse: Report
item.description: If signed by Trump once he takes office, it could allow the quick removal of generals and admirals and purge the ranks of those the future commander-in-chief takes issue with for whatever reason.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, WGN 9
